mapper.sql: select id, third_party_pk, customer, sheet_je, dh, supno, sup, ckno, ck, ksbh, ksmc, bz, jsfs, receive_channel, zjly, create_time from zs_tp_order
select z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.zjly, z.create_time from zs_tp_order z
mapper.select:
z.del_flag = '0'
and z.dh like concat('%', #{dh}, '%')
and z.customer like concat('%', #{customer}, '%')
and z.ksmc like concat('%', #{ksmc}, '%')
and not exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') inner join zs_tp_order_detail l on l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' )
and exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') inner join zs_tp_order_detail l on l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and ( select coalesce(sum(dd.delivery_quantity), 0) from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id ) < ifnull(l.sl, 0) )
and not exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and ( select coalesce(sum(dd.delivery_quantity), 0) from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id ) < ifnull(l.sl, 0) ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l2 where l2.order_id = z.id and l2.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l2.sl, 0) > 0 )
order by z.create_time desc

select id, order_id, third_party_pk, dh, code, name, gg, dw, bzl, sccj, zcz, phflag, sl, dj, je, jm, cgj, bz, bz1, bz2, dsb from zs_tp_order_detail where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time
